description: Synthetic session identifier.
why_it_matters: Useful for grouping rows that belong to the same run.

description: Observation timestamp for each telemetry row.
why_it_matters: Used to reconstruct chronology and segment timing.

description: Sampling interval represented by the row.
why_it_matters: Lets teams convert row counts into duration or energy totals.

description: Synthetic workflow block counter from the generator.
why_it_matters: Useful as a hint only; do not assume it always equals the final phase segment.

description: Declared workflow phase for the row.
why_it_matters: Primary grouping variable for segment-based analysis.

description: Synthetic experiment mode running at that moment.
expected_values_or_units: tile_scan; overview_scan; alignment_check; time_lapse; reconstruction_only; none
why_it_matters: Helps explain why some high-load periods may be expected.

description: Requested quality level.
why_it_matters: Important when judging whether optimization is acceptable.

description: Whether an experiment is actively running.
why_it_matters: Separates active acquisition from passive states.

description: Whether continuous monitoring is considered necessary.
why_it_matters: Key guardrail for deciding whether live view can be paused.

description: Whether live view / preview is currently enabled.
why_it_matters: Main signal behind pause_live_view recommendations.

description: Whether acquisition is continuously displayed during runtime.
why_it_matters: Helpful secondary signal for display-related overhead.

description: Whether a tile scan is active.
why_it_matters: Useful when evaluating scan optimization opportunities.

description: Whether the user is currently interacting with the system.
why_it_matters: Low interaction plus live view often indicates waste.

description: Time since last user interaction.
why_it_matters: A stronger inactivity measure than the instantaneous interaction flag.

description: Tile count along x-axis.
why_it_matters: Part of scan size and data burden.

description: Tile count along y-axis.
why_it_matters: Part of scan size and data burden.

description: Tile overlap percentage.
why_it_matters: High overlap can indicate avoidable scan overhead.

description: Planned scan area.
why_it_matters: Large areas can justify higher throughput or power draw.

description: Preview resolution setting.
why_it_matters: May help explain display and data volume load.

description: Synthetic relative camera/light usage index.
why_it_matters: Proxy for acquisition intensity.

description: Observed CPU utilization.
why_it_matters: Helps distinguish compute-heavy processing from lighter phases.

description: Observed GPU utilization.
why_it_matters: Useful in processing and visualization segments.

description: Observed GPU power draw.
why_it_matters: Strong indicator of visualization or reconstruction load.

description: Disk write throughput.
why_it_matters: Helps detect acquisition-heavy or data-heavy periods.

description: Incoming data throughput.
why_it_matters: Helpful when diagnosing scan burden.

description: Synthetic measure of active processing work.
why_it_matters: Useful for justifying high compute during processing phases.

description: Estimated total system power draw.
why_it_matters: Main energy signal.

description: Estimated energy consumed over the row interval.
why_it_matters: Lets teams compare cumulative energy between segments.

description: Training label for the row.
why_it_matters: Use as a learning signal in training scenarios only.

description: Scenario code.
why_it_matters: Keeps submissions traceable to a scenario.

description: Human-readable scenario title.
why_it_matters: Useful for presentations and tables.

description: Segment identifier derived from contiguous workflow_phase runs.
why_it_matters: This is the key identifier for the submission file.

description: Phase assigned to the segment.
why_it_matters: Teams submit one row per segment.

description: First raw-row index included in the segment.
why_it_matters: Lets teams jump back to the raw data.

description: Last raw-row index included in the segment.
why_it_matters: Lets teams jump back to the raw data.

description: Timestamp of first row in the segment.
why_it_matters: Helps explain chronology.

description: Timestamp of last row in the segment.
why_it_matters: Helps explain chronology.

description: Total represented duration of the segment.
why_it_matters: Simple proxy for exposure time.

description: Number of raw rows collapsed into the segment.
why_it_matters: Useful for understanding granularity.

description: Most common experiment_type inside the segment.
why_it_matters: Context feature.

description: Most common quality constraint inside the segment.
why_it_matters: Context feature.

description: Share of rows where monitoring was required.
why_it_matters: High values should discourage pause_live_view.

description: Share of rows with live view enabled.
why_it_matters: High values plus low interaction can indicate waste.

description: Share of rows with active user interaction.
why_it_matters: Low values indicate unattended periods.

description: Median inactivity duration within the segment.
why_it_matters: Robust inactivity signal.

description: Maximum x tile count in the segment.
why_it_matters: Helps interpret scan scale.

description: Maximum y tile count in the segment.
why_it_matters: Helps interpret scan scale.

description: Mean overlap percentage within the segment.
why_it_matters: Important for optimize_tile_scan_settings.

description: Mean scan area within the segment.
why_it_matters: Helps distinguish large scans from small ones.

description: Mean preview resolution in the segment.
why_it_matters: Secondary complexity signal.

description: Mean camera/light usage index.
why_it_matters: Proxy for acquisition intensity.

description: Mean CPU utilization.
why_it_matters: Processing context.

description: Mean GPU utilization.
why_it_matters: Processing/visualization context.

description: Mean GPU power draw.
why_it_matters: Useful energy feature.

description: Mean disk write throughput.
why_it_matters: Scan/data-load signal.

description: Mean incoming data throughput.
why_it_matters: Scan/data-load signal.

description: Mean processing-items indicator.
why_it_matters: Processing context.

description: Mean total power draw across the segment.
why_it_matters: Main power score at segment level.

description: Total estimated energy consumed by the segment.
why_it_matters: Useful for ranking high-cost segments.

description: Majority row-level action label inside the training segment.
why_it_matters: Training-only target for segment-based approaches; column name matches the submission template.

description: Share of rows supporting the majority action label.
why_it_matters: Helps reveal ambiguous training segments.
